name: Sunteck Realty - Quality Real Estate Company

posts.author: Amit2saxena
posts.community: Sunteck Realty - Quality Real Estate Company
posts.text: Interesting conversation in Q4 FY26 Concall related to Dubai Project: As per management, cost of acquisition of Dubai project is quite low, and hence the project is highly profitable. Below are the figures quoted by management: 385 million dirham was the land value of the project at the time of acquisition, the value now is 1.6 billion dirham. To acquire 50% interest in the project, management paid 70 million dirham at the start, and 60 million dirham this year. Dirham was Rs 12 at the time of acquisition, but now it has moved to Rs 24. No debt in Dubai Project at SPV level, and the project is…
